title: Project preparation
reasonable_ask: Prepare the project calmly before public contact begins.
existing_workflow_checked: Project method, task board and launch workflow

title: Plain-English public documents
reasonable_ask: Can public documents be written so ordinary people understand them?

title: Decision ownership maps
reasonable_ask: Who actually owns a public decision, service or process?

title: Public question rights
reasonable_ask: How can ordinary people ask formal public questions through existing routes?

title: Honest consultation test
reasonable_ask: Do consultations say what is genuinely open and what is already decided?

title: FOI/SAR accountability
reasonable_ask: How clearly do public bodies explain searches, exclusions, redactions and withheld information?

title: Procurement audit for ordinary people
reasonable_ask: Can ordinary people follow public money into contracts and suppliers?

title: Public-sector AI accountability
reasonable_ask: If public bodies use AI or automated tools, who is responsible?

title: Digital exclusion safeguards
reasonable_ask: Can essential services still be used by people who are offline, disabled, older or digitally excluded?

title: Stop subsidising poverty pay
reasonable_ask: Is public money quietly topping up low wages, insecure hours and high rents?

title: No poverty-pay public contracts
reasonable_ask: Should public bodies buy services that depend on poverty wages?

title: Secure-hours standard
reasonable_ask: Does decent work require predictable hours as well as decent hourly pay?

title: Wage theft enforcement
reasonable_ask: How are unpaid time, unlawful deductions and false self-employment found and enforced?

title: NHS low-band dignity campaign
reasonable_ask: Are low-band NHS workers treated with the dignity and support public service requires?

title: Adult social care fair-pay floor
reasonable_ask: Should publicly funded care have a clear fair-pay and conditions floor?

title: Public-service job quality
reasonable_ask: How are turnover, sickness, vacancies, training, bullying and progression tracked in public services?

title: Progression, not just employment
reasonable_ask: Do local employment routes lead somewhere, or only into survival jobs?

title: Workplace mental-health prevention
reasonable_ask: What prevents avoidable workplace stress, bullying and burnout before people become unwell?

title: NHS staff dignity and anti-bullying
reasonable_ask: How do NHS organisations prevent bullying and protect staff dignity in practice?

title: Occupational health independence
reasonable_ask: How is occupational health kept independent from grievance, discipline and performance narratives?

title: Return-to-work safety standards
reasonable_ask: What should safe return-to-work planning include?

title: NHS admin failure as patient harm
reasonable_ask: When does poor administration become a patient-safety issue?

title: Plain-English NHS waiting-list dashboards
reasonable_ask: Can patients understand waiting-list information without needing specialist knowledge?

title: GP access transparency
reasonable_ask: Can patients understand GP access, appointment routes and capacity pressures?

title: Single patient record with safeguards
reasonable_ask: Can better patient records be balanced with privacy, audit and patient control?

title: Water, energy and hardship schemes map
reasonable_ask: Can households find help before they reach crisis point?

title: Advice before food bank
reasonable_ask: Is crisis food help linked to debt, benefits, housing and advice routes?

title: Deductions transparency
reasonable_ask: Are benefit and wage deductions explained, challenged and prevented from causing hardship?

title: Council tax debt reform
reasonable_ask: How are council tax arrears handled before enforcement escalates hardship?

title: Affordable credit / anti-loan-shark campaign
reasonable_ask: What safer borrowing and loan-shark prevention routes exist locally?

title: Essentials guarantee
reasonable_ask: Do income support and local help reflect the real cost of essentials?

title: Fuel poverty and retrofit
reasonable_ask: How does fuel-poverty prevention connect to insulation and heating efficiency?

title: Household emergency resilience
reasonable_ask: How can households build small buffers and practical preparedness before crisis?

title: Housing register plain English
reasonable_ask: Do housing registers explain entitlement, priority and realistic prospects clearly?

title: Temporary accommodation exit plans
reasonable_ask: Are people in temporary accommodation given clear routes out and timescale information?

title: Decent temporary accommodation standards
reasonable_ask: How is temporary accommodation checked for safety, cleanliness and suitability?

title: Private renting enforcement
reasonable_ask: How are poor private-rented conditions reported, inspected and enforced locally?

title: Rent subsidy transparency
reasonable_ask: How much public money flows into high-rent or poor-quality housing provision?

title: Empty homes and empty upper floors
reasonable_ask: What unused housing capacity exists locally and what could bring it back into use?

title: Social housing as national infrastructure
reasonable_ask: Should social housing be treated as long-term national infrastructure?

title: Supported housing accountability
reasonable_ask: How are supported housing quality, safeguarding and value for money monitored?

title: Buses as basic civic infrastructure
reasonable_ask: Are buses planned as basic civic infrastructure?

title: Reliable route guarantee
reasonable_ask: What minimum route, frequency and reliability standards should exist for essential journeys?

title: Non-driver rights
reasonable_ask: How does public planning protect people who cannot drive or cannot afford to drive?

title: Local skills-to-jobs maps
reasonable_ask: Do local training routes connect to real jobs, wages, locations and transport?

title: Adult retraining routes
reasonable_ask: How can adults retrain for real local opportunities without being blocked by cost, transport or unclear routes?

title: Productivity through boring competence
reasonable_ask: Could better systems, management, maintenance and process improvement raise local productivity?

title: High-street civic repair
reasonable_ask: How can high streets, libraries, advice centres and community spaces support civic repair?

title: Care workforce as public infrastructure
reasonable_ask: Should the care workforce be treated as essential infrastructure?

title: Youth NEET prevention
reasonable_ask: How are young people at risk of falling out of education, work or training identified and supported?

title: Prison-release housing guarantee
reasonable_ask: Should anyone leave custody straight into homelessness?

title: Probation resettlement accountability
reasonable_ask: Do housing, GP registration, ID, benefits, addiction support and supervision join up after release?

title: Climate adaptation for ordinary homes
reasonable_ask: How can ordinary homes be protected from heat, flood, damp, drainage, insulation and ventilation risks?
